hero.name: Ayat Mohamed
hero.subtitle: I build enterprise apps at INVOLYS using .NET & React for clients like CNSS and AMDIE. Currently shipping Nino, a SaaS platform for pet adoption.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hey! I'm Ayat, a developer at INVOLYS in Casablanca. Day to day, I work on enterprise web apps for institutions like CNSS, AMDIE, ONHYM, and AMMC — mostly with .NET on the backend and React on the frontend.
about.p2: Outside of work, I'm building Nino — a multi-tenant SaaS that connects animal shelters with people looking to adopt. It's taught me more about system design, auth, and payments than any course ever could.
about.p3: I'm looking to relocate to Germany and join a team where I can grow. I've got B1 German (OSD cert) and working on B2. If you're hiring, let's talk.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey building enterprise software and web applications.

jobs.description: Building enterprise web applications for major Moroccan institutions. Full-stack development with .NET backend and React frontend.
bullets: Develop and maintain enterprise web applications for CNSS, AMDIE, ONHYM, and AMMC
Full-stack development using .NET, React, SQL Server, and Oracle databases
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable software solutions
Provide technical support and troubleshooting for production systems

jobs.description: Built a complete pet adoption website with React frontend, Laravel backend, and MySQL database.
bullets: Developed a pet adoption platform managing listings for dogs, cats, birds, and rodents
Built intuitive UI for browsing, searching, and adopting pets
Integrated stock management and e-commerce features for the shop section
Worked with RESTful APIs and database design

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected work that demonstrates my skills in full-stack development and enterprise software.

items.name: Nino — Pet Adoption SaaS
items.description: A multi-tenant SaaS platform connecting animal shelters with adopters. Features role-based dashboards, pet browser with filters, vet booking, donation system, and real-time analytics.

items.name: Enterprise Applications @ INVOLYS
items.description: Web applications for major Moroccan institutions (CNSS, AMDIE, ONHYM, AMMC). Enterprise-grade software with complex data management and reporting.

items.name: Animal Planet Adoption Platform
items.description: Full-featured pet adoption website with listings management, user-friendly browsing, e-commerce shop section, and multi-category animal support.

items.name: Electric Vehicle Rental
items.description: Web platform for renting electric vehicles including cars and bikes. Features booking system, vehicle management, and responsive design.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: I'm looking for software development roles in Germany — remote or on-site. Got a position, a project, or just want to chat about tech? Drop me a line.
